description: Phase 17 scan_claim_schema: every scanners/*.claim.json must have 8 required fields (id, type, description, actual_cmd, expected, must_fail, recheck_cadence, owner). Optional fields (proposal_ref, tolerance) allowed. Phase 19 extension: the .id field must also be unique across all claim files — two files with the same id would silently overwrite each other in the proof runner.
actual_cmd: bash -c '[ -f reports/n6_claim_schema.json ] && jq -r "if (.deficient_count == 0) and (.duplicate_id_count == 0) then 1 else 0 end" reports/n6_claim_schema.json 2>/dev/null || echo 0'
